title: Bridge Essay: Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation.
concept: Mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, language as mantra.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.
**Phase context:** Mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, language as mantra.

**Review of the Neural Oscillations Underlying Meditation.** — Front Neurosci (2018). DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2018.00178. PMID: 29662434. Objective: Meditation is one type of mental training that has been shown to produce many cognitive benefits. Meditation practice is associated with improvement in concentration and reduction of stress, depression, and anxiety symptoms. Furthermore, different forms of meditation training are now being used as interventions for a variety of psychological and somatic illnesses.
